name: CustomChartRenderer
summary: Base contract a chart renderer implements — render(spec, resolvedTheme) consuming a semantic ChartSpec (Vega-Lite L1 profile) plus resolved webtheme tokens and returning a ChartHandle. Satisfied alike by the native-first SVG default (Frontier UI's canonical impl) and by every library adapter (Vega, Plotly, ECharts). The spec is the only lock: swapping impls leaves the ChartSpec untouched.
